---
title: "Lesson 3: The 4B Framework"
date: "2026-05-21"
order: 4
description: "The four tenets of Bobology — Bob, Bib, B(l)ab, Boobs — walked through one at a time with named research (Erikson, Polivy & Herman, Goffman, Grice, Deci & Ryan, Aristotle, Habermas, Bateson), plus the three pieces of scaffolding that hold them together. Companion to the 23-slide deck."
categories: [bobble, bobology, framework]
path: /the-4b-framework.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/the-4b-framework.html">the standalone lecture</a>… or jump to the <a href="/assets/the-4b-framework.pdf">slide deck (PDF)</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/the-4b-framework.html");</script>
```
